settings.heading: Sizing
settings.body:
Our swimwear runs true to size. If you are between sizes, we recommend sizing up for comfort. Each product page includes detailed measurements — compare your bust, waist, and hip to find your best fit.

For personalised sizing advice, contact our team before you order.

settings.heading: Product Availability
settings.body:
We release new collections throughout the year. Popular styles and colours can sell out quickly, especially during peak season.

If an item is out of stock online, it may still be available in one of our stores. Contact us and we will check for you.

settings.heading: Orders
settings.body:
Once your order is placed, you will receive a confirmation email with your order number and details. Please review your order carefully — if you notice an error, contact us as soon as possible.

We begin processing orders promptly. Changes or cancellations may not be possible once fulfilment has started.

settings.heading: Payment Methods
settings.body:
We accept major credit and debit cards, PayPal, and other payment methods shown at checkout. All transactions are processed securely.

Your card will be charged when your order is placed. For pre-order items, payment may be captured at the time of purchase or when the item ships, as stated on the product page.

settings.heading: Shipping
settings.body:
We ship worldwide from Thailand. Free shipping applies to qualifying orders. Domestic and international delivery times vary by destination and carrier.

For full shipping rates, carriers, and dispatch times, visit our Shipping & Returns page.

settings.heading: Tracking My Order
settings.body:
When your order ships, you will receive an email with tracking information. Use the link provided to follow your parcel with the carrier.

If you have not received tracking within the expected dispatch window, contact us with your order number and we will assist you.

settings.heading: Returns & Exchanges
settings.body:
Eligible unworn items in original condition may be returned within 30 days of delivery. Hygiene liners and tags must remain attached.

Sale items are final sale unless required by law. See our Shipping & Returns page for the full policy.

settings.heading: Swimwear Care
settings.body:
Rinse swimwear in cold water after wear, especially after contact with chlorine, salt water, or sunscreen. Hand wash with mild detergent and lay flat to dry in the shade.

Avoid wringing, tumble drying, and rough surfaces that can snag delicate fabrics.

settings.heading: In-Store Shopping
settings.body:
Visit us in Phuket, Koh Samui, or Koh Phangan for the full Bikini Booth experience. Our teams can help with sizing, styling, and in-store availability.

Store hours and locations are listed on our Contact page.

settings.heading: Gift Cards
settings.body:
Gift cards are available online and in store. They are delivered by email and can be redeemed at checkout on bikinibooth.com.

Gift cards cannot be exchanged for cash and are non-refundable except where required by law.

settings.heading: Promotions
settings.body:
Promotional codes must be entered at checkout and cannot be applied retroactively. Only one code may be used per order unless stated otherwise.

Promotions cannot be combined with other offers unless explicitly permitted. We reserve the right to modify or end promotions at any time.

settings.heading: Contact Us
settings.body:
Still have questions? Our customer care team is happy to help with orders, sizing, store visits, and anything else you need.

Reach us via our Contact page — we aim to respond as quickly as possible.

settings.hero_intro: Find quick answers about orders, sizing, shipping, returns, and caring for your Bikini Booth pieces. We want your shopping experience to feel smooth and easy.
settings.main_lead: Need a little help? Here are answers to the questions we hear most often. If you still need assistance, our team is happy to help.
